players.name: Cal Raleigh
players.summary: 0-for-3 with a strikeout; Mariners edged Cardinals 3-2 on Josh Naylor's sixth-inning solo HR.

players.name: Bryce Harper
players.summary: Solo HR in the 5th; Phillies fell 5-3 to the first-place Braves for their 10th straight loss.

players.name: Luis Arraez
players.summary: 3-for-4 with a stolen base and an RBI as the Giants beat the Marlins.

players.name: Bo Bichette
players.summary: 1-for-4 with a run scored; hit into DP in 5th as Mets fell 4-3 to the Rockies.

players.name: Francisco Lindor
players.summary: On 10-day IL with left calf strain; not expected back until mid-May.

players.name: Pete Crow-Armstrong
players.summary: Led off the 9th with a single and scored the go-ahead run on Swanson's 2-run HR; Cubs rallied from 4-0 for 10th straight win.

players.name: Jackson Merrill
players.summary: Padres off day — traveling to Mexico City for April 25-26 series vs. Arizona.

players.name: Teoscar Hernandez
players.summary: 1-for-4 as the Dodgers' bullpen squandered Sheehan's 10-K gem; Cubs won 6-4 for their 10th straight.

players.name: Devin Williams
players.dnp_reason: No appearance (Mets lost 4-3, no save opportunity)
players.summary: Did not appear; Colorado closer Senzatela finished the 4-3 Rockies win. Williams ERA sits at 9.95.

players.name: Zack Wheeler
players.dnp_reason: Not scheduled (2026 debut Saturday vs. ATL)
players.summary: Season debut set for Saturday vs. Atlanta — first start since thoracic outlet surgery in September.

players.name: Cole Ragans
players.dnp_reason: Not scheduled (Noah Cameron started for KC)
players.summary: Did not start Friday; Ragans holds a 6.00 ERA through 4 starts with command issues (18 BB in 21 IP).

players.name: Chase Burns
players.dnp_reason: Not scheduled (Andrew Abbott started for CIN)
players.summary: Did not start; Burns leads Reds starters with 1.62 ERA and 24 Ks through 3 outings.

players.name: Nathan Eovaldi
players.summary: Roughed up for 3 solo HRs on the first 7 pitches by Oakland's first four batters; exited early in 8-1 loss. Eovaldi (L, 2-3).

players.name: Emmet Sheehan
players.summary: Season-best 10 Ks in 6⅓ dominant innings, 1 ER; Dodgers bullpen blew the lead in 6-4 Cubs win. No decision.

players.name: Reid Detmers
players.dnp_reason: Not scheduled (Yusei Kikuchi started for LAA)
players.summary: Did not start; Angels fell 5-3 to KC with Kikuchi on the mound. Detmers (3.89 ERA) pitches next turn.

players.name: Giancarlo Stanton
players.summary: RBI single before exiting in the 6th with right calf tightness; Yankees won 12-4. Considered day-to-day.
